nodes.label: High-Craft Design
nodes.rationale: Obsessive attention to detail in animations, telemetry data, and system-level status.

nodes.label: Show, Don't Tell Principle
nodes.rationale: Use live telemetry and working code patterns (typewriters, terminal logs) to prove expertise rather than static claims.

nodes.label: The Machine Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Embrace the raw materials of computing—grids, terminal prompts, and status daemons.
